allow: PowerShell($results = @{}; foreach \($tool in 'node','pnpm','docker','git','gh','winget'\) { try { $cmd = Get-Command $tool -ErrorAction Stop; $results[$tool] = "$\($cmd.Source\)" } catch { $results[$tool] = 'NOT FOUND' } }; $results | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---DockerDesktop GUI---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"\) { Write-Output "Docker Desktop installed \(GUI\)" } else { Write-Output "Docker Desktop NOT installed" })

PowerShell($dockerPath = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; if \(Test-Path $dockerPath\) { Write-Output "Docker Desktop installed at: $dockerPath"; Start-Process $dockerPath; Write-Output "Docker Desktop launching..." } else { Write-Output "Docker Desktop NOT FOUND at expected path" })

Bash(cat /tmp/hsentry.json 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "---API log Sentry init---"; tail -20 "C:/Users/tmich/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/C--Users-tmich-OneDrive---OptiRisk-Consulting-e-U-Dokumente-cryptotrader-pro/a5168147-d3fb-4f82-977b-2fca81736bf9/tasks/bxh92plqa.output" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Sentry|Listen|listening|ERROR|Failed" | head -5)
